title: Number separator, region and numpad

posts.author: Franck_m (Franck Mollier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Today in Monday, the country setup in the browser is used to define the separator in number columns (comma or dot). In my country (France) we use comma. So far, everything look good.

But the problem in my case is that it’s no longer possible to use the dot key from the numpad.

Please do somthing about that.

Regards, Franck.

PS: This issue does not apply to Mac users
